Class SeatCustomerRequest

java.lang.Object
messages.SeatCustomerRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SeatCustomerRequest extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a request message to seat a customer at a table. This request is used to finalize the arrival of a customer, verifying them via a confirmation code and recording their actual arrival time.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Fields
    Modifier and Type

    Description
    private LocalTime
    actualArrivalTime
    The actual time the customer arrived at the restaurant.
    private int
    confirmationCode
    The unique confirmation code associated with the customer's reservation.
    private int
    userId
    The unique identifier (ID) of the user/customer to be seated.

  • Constructor Details

    • SeatCustomerRequest

      public SeatCustomerRequest(int userId, int confirmationCode)
      Constructs a new SeatCustomerRequest with the specified user ID and confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      userId - the unique ID of the customer
      confirmationCode - the booking confirmation code

    • getUserId

      public int getUserId()
      Returns the user ID associated with this request.

      the unique identifier of the user

      public int getConfirmationCode()
      Returns the confirmation code associated with this request.

    • getActualArrivalTime

      public LocalTime getActualArrivalTime()
      Returns the actual arrival time of the customer.
      Returns:
      the LocalTime of arrival

    • setActualArrivalTime

      public void setActualArrivalTime(LocalTime actualArrivalTime)
      Sets the actual arrival time of the customer.
      Parameters:
      actualArrivalTime - the LocalTime to be recorded as the arrival time
